---
title: "git_collab_tips"
author: "Brooke & Kim"
format: html
---

## Git Collaboration Tips

### Tips: Brooke

Communicate frequently about what you are working on.
Always pull before starting.
Pull/push and commit with comments frequently to stay up to date.
Commit changes in bite size pieces with clear messages to track changes.


### Tips: <Kim>

<Annotate your code! so you know why you did what you did
 Always pull before you start working>

## How to Create a Merge Conflict 

### Merge Conflict: Owner Resolves

meow meow meowwww meow meow I <3 meow mix
I'm in my own world, and nothing else matters.

### Merge Conflict: Collaborator Resolves

This time Kim is going to push first!
Idk what's going on!

## Summary: How to Avoid Merge Conflicts

<Owner and Collaborator use best practices to write some concluding tips here!>
